ideation: This animation sequence depicts a guide dog attentively walking beside its human companion. The dog's posture should convey alertness, balance, and readiness to respond to commands.  The left arm will simulate the dog's front leg stance, while the right arm will simulate the rear leg.  The animation emphasizes the slight shifts in weight and leg positioning during a natural gait. Frame 1 will be a neutral, walking position. Frame 2 will shift weight to the rear leg, represented by the right arm. Frame 3 will move weight to the front leg, represented by the left arm. Frame 4 will return to a neutral position. Frame 5 will mimic a slight anticipation of a turn.

frames.beat: dog's legs are in a neutral walking stance
weight shifts to the rear leg, front leg extends
weight shifts to the front leg, rear leg tucks slightly
legs return to a neutral walking position
anticipating a turn, a slight lean and twist
